name: get
description: The standalone lodash.get package as a vendorable file. Useful when optional chaining is not enough because paths are dynamic or you need lodash-style default value behavior.
tagline: Read deep values from dynamic paths.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.get file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is not a new path resolver. The value is to keep the existing behavior local and visible inside your repo.
nativeAlternative: Optional chaining and nullish coalescing cover some cases, but they do not replace dynamic string paths, array-style path parsing, or lodash's exact default value behavior.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
